# Code of Conduct

This project follows the Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct.

## Our Pledge

We are committed to making participation in this project a respectful and harassment-free experience for everyone.

## Expected Behavior

- Be respectful and constructive.
- Assume good faith, but require sources for factual ownership claims.
- Focus criticism on data quality, evidence, and methodology.
- Avoid personal attacks, harassment, or inflammatory language.

## Unacceptable Behavior

- Harassment, threats, or discriminatory language
- Publishing private information without permission
- Deliberately adding unsourced or misleading ownership claims
- Repeatedly ignoring maintainer guidance on source quality

## Enforcement

Maintainers may edit, close, or reject issues and pull requests that violate this code. Serious or repeated violations may lead to a ban from project participation.

Contributor Covenant reference: https://www.contributor-covenant.org/
